subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: When was Rajasthan state formed and who were the rulers during that time?
question_hi: राजस्थान का स्थानीय तिथि क्या है और वह समय में राजाओं कौन थे?
A_en: Rajasthan was formed on November 1, 1956, and during that time, the rulers were:
A_hi: राजस्थान का स्थानीय तिथि है और वह समय में राजाओं कौन थे।
B_en: Rajasthan was formed on November 1, 1956, and during that time, the rulers were:

C_hi: राजस्थान का स्थानीय तिथि नहीं, लेकिंगों कौन थे।
